variables.notes: No revenue/sales line is present in the provided Income Statement preview; this appears to be an investment entity statement without a top-line revenue row.
No cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present in the provided Income Statement preview.

candidates.why: Explicit operating overhead bucket and preferred over individual components when a populated SG&A-like row exists.
Valid SG&A component, but component should not be added when an explicit populated overhead row exists.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit populated overhead row per SG&A hierarchy. Excluded component rows to avoid double counting.
No research and development expense line is present in the provided Income Statement preview.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line and most preferred match.
Acceptable fallback if the direct interest expense line is missing in some years.
Balancing row, not a true reported line item; should not be used unless no real finance cost line exists.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the direct reported interest expense first, with net interest as fallback. Excluded balancing row.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution of earnings, not a balance sheet equity stock measure.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no parent/owner equity line exists; less preferred because it may include NCI.
Full balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line is present in the provided Balance Sheet preview.
